notes: Game launches with a all red screen, game music plays so I am assuming the main menu did load fine. The game used to run fine with older version of MESA + Proton but with dynamic numerical values not showing correctly as mentioned in another report. Both MESA and AMDVLK have this issue, so it's a AMDGPU or WINE/Proton issue (maybe both).
title: 8-Bit Hordes
